behavioral_stage.sub_stage: Confidence and Over-Reliance on Past Success
behavioral_stage.sub_stage_definition: Strong self-belief driven by prior achievements, with an assumption that past strategies will continue to work without adaptation.

employee_questionnaire.question_text: You rely on past successes to navigate your current challenges.
You assume that what worked in the past will work in your current role without much adaptation.
You feel confident that you have all the skills and tools required for your current responsibilities.
You feel enthusiastic about your current role, believing you can make a big impact.

strengths.description: Carries strong self-belief derived from prior achievements.

weaknesses.description: May apply outdated methods without sufficient validation.

opportunities.description: Can integrate past success with present realities.

threats.description: Overconfidence may block innovation and feedback.

principles: Honor past success without being trapped by it

recommended_actions.recommendation: Test assumptions against current context before acting.
